name: Discover it Student Chrome
signup_bonus: Unlimited Cashback Match for first year
perks: 2% cash back at gas stations and restaurants (up to $1,000 combined purchases per quarter)
Cashback Match: Discover doubles all cash back earned at the end of the first year
No penalty APR for first late payment
Good Grade Reward: $20 statement credit each school year GPA is 3.0 or higher
Freeze account instantly via app or website
drawbacks: Discover not as widely accepted internationally as Visa or Mastercard
Only 1% after the cap on gas and restaurant categories
Requires you to be a student enrolled in a 2- or 4-year college
